title: Tata Sons back on track in FY26 with Rs 32,000 crore profit
summary: Tata Sons has reported robust growth for FY26, with income from operations nearing ₹42,000 crore and net profit around ₹32,000 crore, a significant rebound from the previous year. The company doubled its dividend payout to Tata Trusts to over ₹3,000 crore. Key operating companies like TCS and Tata Motors, alongside emerging ventures such as Tata Electronics, contributed to this strong performance despite global uncertainties.

title: Stocks to buy below  ₹100: Mehul Kothari of Anand Rathi recommends three shares to buy or sell
summary: Next week, Bank Nifty's trading range is set between 57,000 and 59,000, with breakouts suggesting future trends. Analyst Mehul Kothari advises buying Trident, UCO Bank, and MMTC under  ₹100, as the Indian market remains strong amid mixed signals and easing crude oil prices.

title: Buy or sell: Sumeet Bagadia recommends three stocks to buy on Monday - 29 June 2026
summary: Sumeet Bagadia recommended these three buy-or-sell stocks: Dr Reddy's Labs, M&amp;M, and Tata Consumer.

title: Trump administration clears Anthropic to roll out Claude Mythos 5 to over 100 organisations: Report
summary: The US government has permitted Anthropic to release its Claude Mythos 5 AI model to trusted partners.&nbsp;

title: Why Equirus is avoiding loss-making startups in its  ₹1,500 crore fund
summary: Equirus new fund launch comes as India’s startup funding market becomes more selective, even though early-stage capital has held up better than late-stage funding.

title: How to find your real risk appetite? Experts explain how to identify it and build the right portfolio
summary: Experts suggests that an investor's risk appetite depends on financial capacity and emotional comfort with risk. Assess your income, savings, liabilities, age, and ability to handle market volatility. Together, these factors help determine the level of risk you can sustain over the long term.

title: Dearness Allowance: Here's why AIDEF is demanding a change in the DA calculation formula
summary: DA hike: The AIDEF has requested the 8th pay commission to revise how dearness allowance is calculated, arguing the current formula fails to reflect true living costs and inflation pressures on government employees and pensioners.

title: Bank holiday today: Are bank operations across India closed on 27 June for fourth Saturday off? Check RBI calendar here
summary: Public and private banks in India will be closed today, 27 June, for the fourth Saturday holiday. Operations are halted nationwide, but online banking services will remain accessible for transactions.

title: SpaceX will join Nasdaq-100
summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.

title: Sebi rejects Anil Ambani's settlement request over Reliance Infrastructure
summary: India's market regulator has rejected Anil Ambani's settlement bids concerning allegations of misusing nearly $700 million in company funds. The Securities and Exchange Board of India cited parallel investigations by other agencies, stating the transactions could be for personal enrichment. This marks the second settlement rejection for Ambani, with the group categorically denying the claims.

title: Concurrent Gainers: 10 smallcap stocks that gain for 5 days in a row
summary: Despite the Sensex slipping 0.4% over the five trading sessions that ended June 25, several small-cap stocks extended their winning streak. Pearl Global Industries, TV Today Network and SKF India were among the top performers, with 10 stocks gaining in all five sessions and delivering returns of up to 19%.

title: Beyond Valuations: Philip Fisher's timeless guide to quality stock investing
summary: Legendary investor Philip Fisher championed a qualitative approach to stock picking, emphasizing exceptional businesses with strong management and durable competitive advantages. His 15-point checklist, still relevant today, guides investors to look beyond numbers, focusing on long-term growth potential, innovation, financial strength, and, crucially, management integrity. Fisher's philosophy stresses that identifying outstanding companies and holding them for the long haul is key to building lasting wealth.

title: Healthcare demand is outstripping supply in Noida, says MOFSL; prefers Medanta, Max Healthcare
summary: Noida-Greater Noida is rapidly becoming a prime healthcare hub in North India, fueled by population growth and corporate expansion. Despite increasing capacity, the region faces a significant shortage of super-specialty beds. Strong demand for various medical services is evident, with hospitals experiencing rising occupancy and robust revenue. Infrastructure development further bolsters the market's long-term potential, though doctor availability remains a challenge.

title: Q1 earnings preview: Here’s what Nomura expects from Nestle, Titan, other consumer majors’ June quarter results
summary: Nomura expects consumer staples to deliver a strong start to FY27, forecasting double-digit sales growth for several companies in the June quarter. The brokerage is bullish on Nestle, Titan, Britannia, Tata Consumer and Marico, citing steady demand, pricing gains and margin support despite higher raw material costs.

title: Vijay Kedia explains why every bull market ends the same way—and where the next opportunity could be
summary: Vijay Kedia shares insights on market cycles, explaining that investment opportunities rotate through phases of optimism, euphoria, and correction. He encourages investors to recognize patterns in asset classes and advises focusing on long-term strategies rather than short-term trends.&nbsp;

title: After months of pain, Dalal Street is ready for a comeback? ICICI Securities explains why
summary: ICICI Securities reports that Indian equities are starting to improve due to better macroeconomic conditions, more attractive valuations, and reduced foreign selling. Despite previous market challenges, the outlook for equities is becoming more favorable as various risks begin to stabilize.

title: US stock markets: Dow Jones hits record high, Nasdaq sinks 4.6% - What shook Wall Street this week?
summary: For the week ended June 26, the Dow Jones Industrial Average outperformed its peers, gaining about 0.6% to close at a record high. The broader S&amp;P 500, however, declined 2.0%, while the tech-heavy Nasdaq Composite tumbled 4.6%.

title: ITC Chairman Sanjiv Puri's remuneration fell 6.8% in FY26 on back of lower performance bonus: Here's how much he made
summary: ITC Chairman and MD Sanjiv Puri's remuneration fell 6.8 per cent to  ₹23.91 crore in FY26 due to lower performance bonuses and long-term incentives

title: Atanu Chakraborty terms HDFC Bank's legal review superfluous
summary: Appointing external law firms, including an American one, was just a compliance exercise, says Atanu Chakraborty, who resigned as HDFC Bank chairman in March.

summary: Gold, Silver Rate Today: Here is how much gold and silver costs in key Indian cities on Saturday, 27 June 2026. Check the price of 18K, 22K and 24K gold and 999 Fine silver in Ahmedabad, Bengaluru, Chennai, Delhi, Hyderabad, Kolkata, and Mumbai.

title: 8th pay commission to examine pay upgrade after promotion for central govt employees under MACP scheme, says report
summary: The Centre has said that the 8th pay commission will examine pay upgrade after promotion for central government employees demanded by NC-JCM under the career progression MACP scheme. Here's all we know…
